impact: Residual non-blocking gap: dashboard surface doc test asserts key route slugs are present in the matrix but does not cross-check them against docs/external/mdi/endpoint-index.jsonl. Reviewer confirmed current slugs are valid.
resolution: Added a dashboard surface matrix test cross-check that parses docs/external/mdi/endpoint-index.jsonl and verifies each approved embedded workflow slug documented in the matrix exists in the generated endpoint index as a partner-surface operation.
title: [test-coverage] Residual non-blocking gap: dashboard surface doc test asserts key route slugs ar
